title: Iliad, Book 9: The Embassy to Achilles
description: Book 9 of Homer's Iliad: The Embassy to Achilles.
introduction: Book 9 of the Iliad: The Embassy to Achilles. The Greek text is from the Venetus A manuscript (10th century), the oldest complete manuscript of the Iliad.

translation.original_text: Ὣς Τρῶες φυλακὰς ἔχον· αὐτὰρ Ἀχαιούς θεσπεσίη ἔχε φύζα.
translation.text: Panic gripped the Achaeans. Agamemnon sent an embassy to Achilles: Odysseus, Ajax, and Phoenix, offering gifts beyond counting — seven tripods, ten talents of gold, twenty cauldrons, twelve horses, seven women of Lesbos, and the return of Briseis untouched. Achilles refused. He said he would sail home at dawn.
